scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue,bgMagenta" "npm run dev -w merosadak-backend" "npm run dev -w merosadak-frontend"
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules backend/dist frontend/dist
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && wrangler deploy && firebase deploy --only hosting && npm run deploy:render
scripts.deploy:all: npm run build && npm run deploy:render
scripts.start: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue,bgMagenta" "npm run start -w merosadak-backend" "npm run start -w merosadak-frontend"
scripts.deploy:all:push: npm run deploy:all && git add . && git commit -m "Auto-build $(date)" && git push origin main --force-with-lease
